page.title: Template:Religious organizations (dis)established in the YYY0s category header

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '<includeonly><!-- # The first step is to check whether this is a category page -->{{Category other<!-- -->|<!-- ############### It is a category ############################### # So check that it matches the required format: "Religious organizations (dis)established in the YYY0s" -->{{#ifeq: {{#expr:<!-- -->{{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations established in the %d%d%...'
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations established in the %d%d%d0s$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations disestablished in the %d%d%d0s$|plain=false}}}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Religious organizations (dis)established in the YYY0s category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"Religious organizations established in the YYY0s"}} or {{nowrap|"Religious organizations disestablished in the YYY0s"}}, where YYY0s is an 4-digit decade (e.g. "1900s"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{Religious organizations (dis)established in the YYY0s category header/core|decade={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations (%a+)ed in the (%d%d%d0)s$|%2|1|false}}|action={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations (%a+)ed in the (%d%d%d0)s$|%1|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Religious organizations (dis)established in the YYY0s category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"Religious organizations established in the YYY0s"}} or {{nowrap|"Religious organizations disestablished in the YYY0s"}}, where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade (e.g. "1930s)"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}} {{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation}}

{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations established in the %d%d%d0s$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations disestablished in the %d%d%d0s$|plain=false}}}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Religious organizations (dis)established in the YYY0s category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"Religious organizations established in the YYY0s"}} or {{nowrap|"Religious organizations disestablished in the YYY0s"}}, where YYY0s is an 4-digit decade (e.g. "1900s"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{Religious organizations (dis)established in the YYY0s category header/core|decade={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations (%a+)ed in the (%d%d%d0)s$|%2|1|false}}|action={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations (%a+)ed in the (%d%d%d0)s$|%1|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].
[[Template:Religious organizations (dis)established in the YYY0s category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"Religious organizations established in the YYY0s"}} or {{nowrap|"Religious organizations disestablished in the YYY0s"}}, where YYY0s is a 4-digit decade (e.g. "1930s)"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]}} {{CatAutoTOC}}{{Documentation}}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations established in the %d%d%d0s$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations disestablished in the %d%d%d0s$|plain=false}}}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
[[Template:Religious organizations (dis)established in the YYY0s category header]] is for use only on category pages whose title is of the form {{nowrap|"Religious organizations established in the YYY0s"}} or {{nowrap|"Religious organizations disestablished in the YYY0s"}}, where YYY0s is an 4-digit decade (e.g. "1900s"}}[[Category:Errors reported by other category header templates]]|{{Religious organizations (dis)established in the YYY0s category header/core|decade={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations (%a+)ed in the (%d%d%d0)s$|%2|1|false}}|action={{#invoke:String|replace|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations (%a+)ed in the (%d%d%d0)s$|%1|1|false}}}}}}|{{Error|This page is not in the [[Wikipedia:Namespace|category namespace]].

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations established in the %d%d%d0s$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations disestablished in the %d%d%d0s$|plain=false}}}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations established in the %d%d%d0s$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations disestablished in the %d%d%d0s$|plain=false}}}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Category other|{{#ifeq: {{#expr:{{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations established in the %d%d%d0s$|plain=false}} + {{#invoke:String|find|{{PAGENAME}}|^Religious organizations disestablished in the %d%d%d0s$|plain=false}}}}|0|{{Error|Invalid page name.
